programme.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programme.desc: The story revolves around the lives of four guys named Gopal, Lucky, Madhav, and Laxman who all absurdly fall for the same girl. Hence, begins the hilarious race to win her heart.

programme.title: Golmaal Returns
programme.desc: Gopal¡¯s life hits choppy waters when he gets stuck on a yacht for a night upon rescuing an attractive young woman by fighting off some goons. Now, he has his wife suspecting him of having an affair and a police officer on his tail.

programme.title: Agnipankh
programme.desc: Three Indian Air Force pilots are captured and taken captive by Pakistani troops. While in jail, they meet other Indians and plan a jailbreak.

programme.title: Jaanbaaz Commando
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Venghai
programme.desc: A respectable village head decides to keep his son away from the violent politics of rural life. However, fate intervenes, forcing the young man to not only return home, but also take up the sickle.

programme.title: Operation Java
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
programme.desc: To pursue his love interest, TV reporter Geeta, Raju misleads the police with false clues during a murder investigation. His lies soon land him in trouble with the police and the mafia.

programme.title: Anjaana Anjaaani
programme.desc: The film of two strangers, who meet on a bridge intending to commit suicide. After bonding over their shared miseries,they make a pact to live life to the fullest for the next 20 days and explore various adventures together. As they embark on this trip, they begin to develop feelings for each other, leading to a complex and emotional journey. Will they embrace their new-found love or stick to their original plan?

programme.title: Mission Istanbul
programme.desc: An action thriller film that follows the story of a journalist, Vikas, who is sent to Istanbul to cover a breaking news story. However, he becomes embroiled in a dangerous conspiracy involving international terrorism and political corruption. The movie features high-octane action sequences and explores themes of courage, patriotism, and the importance of journalistic integrity in a thrilling and suspenseful plot.

programme.title: Do Jism Ek Jaan Hain Hum
programme.desc: Rano, a beautiful girl, falls in love with Karan, who is an official in the village. They want to get married, but her father refuses.

programme.title: The Lease
programme.desc: Hoping for a fresh start, Julia, a troubled woman, moves to Los Angeles with her new boyfriend. After settling into a new home, mysterious things begin to happen. It's not long before Julia becomes convinced that her demons have moved with her.

programme.title: If is a Big Word
programme.desc: It seems to the 35-year-old Yekaterina Kolesnikova that her life got on to the wrong track: instead of being a model on the catwalk in Milan she works in a factory making working clothes. And her husband, a once brilliant and talented musician, has turned out to be a local finance officer. But now Fate suddenly gives Katya a chance to go back seventeen years and try to change her life. Will it make her happy?

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Terror Of Hallow'S Eve
programme.desc: After a fifteen-year-old is brutally beaten up by High School bullies, his wish for revenge unknowingly unleashes the Terror of Halloween.

programme.title: Steve Martini's The Judge
programme.desc: The reputation of Paul Madriani, the much-admired lawyer is at stake as he is called to defend Judge Acosta.

programme.title: Different Flowers
programme.desc: On the day of her big Midwestern wedding, Millie, a persnickety bride, jilts her fiance at the altar.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Ming steals a lake from Earth, so Flash and his friends head to Mongo with plans to destroy the generator.

programme.title: Steve Martini's The Judge
programme.desc: The reputation of Paul Madriani, the much-admired lawyer is at stake as he is called to defend Judge Acosta.

programme.title: Different Flowers
programme.desc: On the day of her big Midwestern wedding, Millie, a persnickety bride, jilts her fiance at the altar.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: OK! MADAM
programme.desc: Mi-Young runs a shop at a traditional market, where she makes and sells twisted bread sticks. Her husband Seok-Hwan works as a computer repairman. One day, Seok-Hwan wins a free trip to Hawaii. Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan will go on their first international trip together. When Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan get on the airplane to Hawaii, things don't go as expected. Terrorists, including Cheol-Seung, who chase after a secret agent, get on the same airplane. The passengers soon become hostages. Suddenly, Mi-Young and Seok-Hwan begin to rescue the passengers.

programme.title: Rail Kings
programme.desc: Riding speeding boxcars, Preston encounters hostile train yards, vicious railroad cops, hidden hobo jungles, mysterious Lacy, the notorious Baron and his colorful Hobo Gang. In a surprise ending, Preston finally confronts Phantom 13. Based on the controversial Hobo Times books.An irresponsible preppie, Preston West, is presumed to have murdered his parents for a sizeable inheritance, so he flees to find the real killer, Phantom 13, a crazed freight train hobo!

programme.desc: Starcast-Karamjit Anmol, Sruishty Mann, Sardar Sohi, Sanju Solanki, Anita Sabdeesh, Gurpreet Bhangu, Deedar Gill, Rimson Kaur, Malkit Rauni

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: Juggler
programme.desc: Super Hungry" is a comedic adventure showcasing Jerry's insatiable appetite and Jane's playful attempts to feed him. Jane's idea of using "Hunger Syrup" leads to unexpected consequences as Jerry accidentally consumes the entire bottle, causing his hunger to intensify. A hilarious chase ensues as Jerry devours everyt_hing in sight, leaving Jane both amazed and exhausted. With a clever twist involving chili and a bucket of water, Jerry's hunger is finally satiated, resulting in laughter and relief for both characters

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer

programme.title: Domino's Effect
programme.desc: In their imaginative world, Jerry transforms into a baby superhero, emulating heroic actions and surprising Jane with his playful antics. Jerry's mischievousness leads to both laughter and chall_hines as he playfully interrupts Jane's daily activities. However, when faced with a real threat in the form of a cockroach, Jerry's true superhero nature emerges, and he comes to Jane's rescue. With their bond str_hinthened, Jane rewards Jerry with a real superhero cape, acknowledging his extraordinary spirit. Together, they triumph over obstacles and celebrate their super-powered adventures.

programme.title: Magic Marker
programme.desc: JERRY, a curious and mischievous toddler, playing on the floor withsome toys. He notices amagic marker on the coffee table and picks it up.He starts to draw on the walls and furniture, creating colorful and abstract designs.

programme.title: BirthdayCake
programme.desc: Jerry playfully disrupts Jane's cleaning routine by scattering toys and bowls. He surprises Jane by juggling the toys and later the crockeries, showcasing his dexterity and coordination. Jane joins in the fun, and they _hinage in a playful juggling act together, creating a harmonious and entertaining moment in their home.

programme.title: The Monster Not Under the Bed
programme.desc: The Secret Lab Kids shrink themselves to microscopic proportions in order to prove to Joelle that there are no monsters hiding under her bed. They just didn't count on all the other microscopic creatures.

programme.title: Amusement park
programme.desc: ," Jane and Jerry _hinage in a playful dance-off, constantly trying to one-up each other. Their antics escalate as they use various props to outdo the other, leading to a comical series of mishaps. However, when their beloved music player breaks, they realize the power of their shared passion for music and come together to create their own joyful tune, ending on a heartwarming note of friendship and celebration.

programme.title: Drone Attack
programme.desc: Jerry's mischievous behavior leads to a mess of toys and books scattered around the living room. Jane tries to catch the thrown objects but ends up getting hit herself. However, Jerry realizes Jane's sadness and starts helping her collect the items. They work together, with Jerry attempting to balance a pile of books and Jane using a box to collect the toys. After some mishaps, they successfully gather everyt_hing, but when the box breaks, they find themselves buried under the pile. They laugh together, realizing the joy in their shared experience.

programme.title: Picnic
programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 11
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 11
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 11
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 12
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 13
programme.desc: The bumbling but lovable Bear Brothers are back, and Logger Vick remains in hot pursuit! Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: I' ll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn' t chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it' s all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren' t really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Tommy the Little Dragon
programme.desc: Tommy is a soft toy who lives with an ordinary panda family. Panda parents have no idea about him, while their cubs cannot live a day without Tommy! With the help of his magic soap bubbles, Tommy teleports kids to wonderful universes full of adventures, to help them discover a vast and captivating world, fight their fears and inhibitions, and learn important family values.

programme.title: Bat Pat
programme.desc: The series follows the comedy adventures of Bat Pat and the Silver brothers Martin, Leo and Rebecca as they unravel mysteries and cross paths with supernatural creatures of the night that lurk, haunt, shriek and dig themselves up in every dark corner of their home in Fogville, a small town that seems to be the center of all things weird in the world, a veritable magnet to ghosts, mummies, witches, creatures, werewolves and things that go bump in the night. Bat Pat will prove that the supernatural isn't always evil but just misunderstood. Our heroes will come to understand something important: the supernatural “bad guys” are not really bad, but normal people whose actions are misunderstood by the more inhabitants of Fogville and what they really want is... just help!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie's play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: Pirate school
programme.desc: On a small remote island surrounded by endless seas, a special Pirate School was opened, where children from pirate families study. Among them are Keel, Fuse and Bobo. The pirate origin does not relieve them from study and normal school duties.

programme.title: Crazy Candies S01 Ep 35
programme.desc: Dream is the source of Power.It inspires people with their vision of a beautiful and bright future.In the midst of ordinary life in Magic Dream Jar,the extraordinary happens because of Marshyo and his best friend Jacky.

programme.title: GATTU S10 EPI 11
programme.desc: In a Fairy Kingdom,there is a group of righteous Five-Spirit Guards who is protecting the locals from evils. They got magic power, for which is GG Bond always dreaming. But driven by the ambition and the lust for the power, some of Five-Spirit Guards attempted to break the peace of the world and forcibly occupy it.

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Lupo rents out his attic room, but the lady is not quite right and has evil intentions. / Grandma Eusebia asks F&F to take her dog to the groomers, but Schnucki doesn't want to go to the cleaners. / F&F and her uncle go on vacation, but their luggage is stolen on the train. / An unwanted driving lesson for Lucky

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: Crocodile Jazz becomes the owner of an inflatable rubber nightclub. Cockatoo Ajax is to be the main attraction. That's why Hartacker goes completely crazy.

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: When Milly suddenly falls ill and the doctor is called, she is completely desperate. She doesn't want to swallow the yellow medicine because she knows how disgusting it tastes. But with the help of a new gummy putty that her father has developed, she manages to make a chocolate spoon that makes swallowing the medicine even sweeter.

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Lord Kann, the evil ruler of the goblins, is terminally ill. Daiman and Balabust know only one way out: they kidnap Fala, the healer of the elves, to cure Kann.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: Like her friend Millicent, Gloria wants to go to the ballet. She doesn't believe that Gloria will manage to get into the class. But not only does Gloria get in, she also gets a part...

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The Da Boom crew land on the scrap planet after a battle. They need a few spare parts to repair their ship. But the inhabitant of the junkyard, Zurge, doesn't want to help the kids...

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Bob actually wanted to dig his way back to New York. But in the process he comes across an old treasure map. Together with Nel and Zaza, he sets off in search of Wirwindi's treasure...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Agents try to ruin the lives of the Queen and Shakespear.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: One day, a sleeping boy called Slick lies in Milly's bed. Slick has run away from home and is now roaming around the neighborhood. Milly accuses the boy of stealing from her...

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Uncle Fax has a toothache but doesn't want to go to the doctor / The friends go cycling and Lupo ends up in a cave. A Stone Age man finds the children / The cinema owner is ill and the small children are unhappy. The four friends want to help. / In the middle of the night, mom hears noises and sends the not at all brave men of the house to investigate. A rumbling surprise awaits them.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: Hotel manager Hartacker tries to intimidate the crocodiles with a ghost show. But they see through his evil plan...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: Milly is supposed to look after Humperdink the hamster for the weekend. Black Cat, however, reacts a little jealously and soon makes sure that the hamster disappears. Now Milly and Sam try to find the little creepy-crawly, but it is only when Milly invents a hamster search engine that they are successful. Humperdink is back, and Black Cat now knows that she has no reason to be jealous.

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Phaedon just can't let it go. Time and again, he betrays and betrays the elves. Now he has hatched a particularly devious plan...

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Phaedon just can't let it go. Time and again, he betrays and betrays the elves. Now he has hatched a particularly devious plan...

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Someone is dumping toxic waste into the sea! Monty has fallen ill from the toxic waste and has red spots all over him. Bob and his friends have to prevent others from getting infected...

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: Some aliens have tracked down a boom cart. But the module has been stolen. The thieves have only left their initials behind: G.G. The Da Boom crew must track down the mysterious thieves...

programme.title: THE NOTEKINS
programme.desc: Step into the magical world of music in The Notekins. This delightful series features seven little people that represent each of the seven musical notes.

programme.desc: Meet Push, Carry and Lift, 3 vehicle friends who love to race each other and count. In each episode the 3 friends, Tractor, Dump Truck and a Crane, meet for a race, run into a problem and together find the solution, all while counting.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: Ekaant
programme.desc: India is known for its remarkable architecture and serene landscapes. Its rich history is steeped in mystery its vastness - lends itself to several stories and urban legends. Ekaant takes you through the abandoned roads and alleys of some of India's historic locations. Travelling through the spread out palaces and deserted forts, the show documents and investigates the eerie processes of abandonment of each site. How flourishing towns and cities came to be in ruins, is the question each episode seeks to answer. Ekaant explores the ceasing of life and the triumph of nature even in the most populated of places and takes you on the road no longer travelled.

programme.title: Blue Monastery, Georgia
programme.desc: One of the most important monuments of Tbilissi is the Lurji Monastery.The complex is often referred to as Blue monastery which derived from its roof, adorned with glazed blue tile. The church stands in the central part of the city, at the Vere Park, on t"&"he right bank of the Mtkvari river not far from the mouth of the Vere River.

programme.title: The Parish Church of St Mary & St Eanswythe, United Kingdom
programme.desc: Just a stone's throw away from the English Channel, Kent is a county situated in the southeast of England.

programme.title: Cathedral La Major, France
programme.desc: Just on the outskirts of the delightfully vibrant Marseille, lies what locals affectionately call the Cathedral of La Major. An impressive Roman Catholic cathedral and basilica minor, this astounding architectural gem stands guard over the Old-Port of Marseille. It is a respected, protected much loved-national monument of France: The Cathedral of Sainte-Marie-Majeure, or The Major as locals called it.

programme.title: Holy Trinity Cathedral, Ethiopia
programme.desc: Addis Ababa, Ethiopia's capital and largest city, is a buzzing hub of economic, social, and political activity with an energetic and eclectic personality and style all its own in Africa. This historic city is dotted with extraordinary examples of art and "&"architecture that include museums, cathedrals, and various complexes. One of such amusing architectural gems of the city is the Holy Trinity Cathedral

programme.title: Church of Nativity, Israel
programme.desc: The Church of The Nativity is situated in Betlehem to the south of Jerusalem.In 327 the church of Nativity was commissioned by Constantine the Great and his mother Helena over the site that was traditionally considered to be located over the cave that mar"&"ks the birthplace of Jesus…

programme.title: Church of Santo Domingo, Colombia
programme.desc: We are in Colombia, looking for the oldest church in the World Heritage Site of Cartagena: The Church of Santo Domingo.

programme.title: The Dormition of the Mother of God Cathedral in Varna, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The Dormition of the Mother of God Cathedral is the largest cathedral of Varna and one of the most impressive sites in the city. With its height of 38 meters, the Dormition of the Mother of God is one of the tallest churches in Bulgaria and certainly one "&"of the most important in the country's long history.

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, Italy
programme.desc: Hidden in the hills of Italy lies Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, the Ducal Palace of Urbino. It may seem strange to find such grand Renaissance architecture outside of the great cities. We all know about Rome, Venice, Florence and their great works. But the Ducal Palace of Urbino is often forgotten, despite rivaling all of them with its splendor and great history.

programme.title: HOTELS in Rio de Janeiro
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Paris in France (Part 3)

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara"&". First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop "&"a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Brooklyn
programme.desc: When you think New York City, you probably envision Manhattan. Yet a lot of the city's heart and soul resides in Brooklyn.
